good.name: Good
good.desc: Air quality is satisfactory; little or no risk.

moderate.name: Moderate
moderate.desc: Acceptable; sensitive individuals should limit prolonged outdoor exertion.

sensitive.name: Unhealthy for Sensitive Groups
sensitive.desc: Sensitive groups may experience effects. The general public is less likely to be affected.

unhealthy.name: Unhealthy
unhealthy.desc: Everyone may begin to experience effects. Sensitive groups may be more seriously affected.

very_unhealthy.name: Very Unhealthy
very_unhealthy.desc: Health warnings of emergency conditions. The entire population is more likely to be affected.

hazardous.name: Hazardous
hazardous.desc: Health alert: everyone may experience serious effects. Avoid outdoor activities.

forecast.title: Forecast
forecast.subtitle: Pollutant trend and predictive analysis
forecast.guide: What this page does: It loads real historical pollutant data from Open-Meteo for the last 90 days for the city you enter, then extends it with a forward-looking forecast, confidence band, and model-accuracy context.
forecast.waiting_actuals: Waiting for actual data to validate

analytics.title: Analytics Lab
analytics.subtitle: From descriptive to diagnostic air-quality intelligence
analytics.guide: What this page shows: Temporal patterns, geographic spillover, model accuracy, cross-city comparison, and anomaly detection for the selected city. Each analysis lens loads only when needed.
analytics.fallback_note: Archive data was not available for this pollutant, so the dashboard is showing a historical backtest fallback.

reports.title: Reports
reports.subtitle: Professional export · any city · personal carbon footprint
reports.share_text: Air quality snapshot for {city}: AQI {aqi} ({level}), PM2.5 {pm25:.1f} ug/m3, monthly carbon footprint {footprint:.2f} t CO2. Created with AirPulse Global. #CleanAir #AirPulseGlobal #ClimateAction
